title: carthamus linearifolius
intro: Carthamus linearifolius, also known as the linear-leaved safflower or linear-leaved thistle, is a plant species in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Carthamus linearifolius is often used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
